title: pavonia rubra
intro: Pavonia rubra, also known as the red rose mallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin conditions. Pavonia rubra is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
